headline: Edible Garden (EDBL) Expands Its Target Partnership As Retail Momentum Builds
summary: Edible Garden AG Incorporated (NASDAQ:EDBL) is among the 7 Best Vertical Farming and Hydroponic Stocks to Invest in. On April 21, Edible Garden AG Incorporated (NASDAQ:EDBL) announced it has secured expanded distribution with Target, increasing its supply of fresh-cut herbs to the retailer. This development reflects growing demand for the company’s organic and sustainably produced offerings […]

headline: RBC Raises Price Target on Target to $132 Ahead of Q1: Is the Turnaround Finally Resonating?
summary: RBC Capital analyst Steven Shemesh raised the firm’s price target on Target (NYSE:TGT) stock to $132 from $130, maintaining an Outperform rating ahead of next week’s Q1 FY2026 earnings report. The firm stated it is “cautiously optimistic that turnaround efforts are beginning to resonate with the consumer.” A $2 bump rarely moves the needle on ... RBC Raises Price Target on Target to $132 Ahead of Q1: Is the Turnaround Finally Resonating?
